title: Hypurrco x Hyperlend
summary_title: HyperLend: building Aave for Hyperliquid with isolated pools and exotic collateral
summary_description: First native lending protocol on Hyper EVM aims to offer more collateral options and community-first approach than established giants.

key_moments.label: Benjamin introduces HyperLend founding team and background
Hyper Collective explains community-led mission to market Hyperliquid
HyperLend's mission: become the go-to lending protocol on Hyper EVM
Strategy vs Aave: isolated pools, exotic collateral, community involvement
Security approach: private audit plus $100k Cantina competition
Day one launch includes collateralized HYPE and PUR with mystery tool Friday
Collateralizing perpetual positions to attract traders and kickstart TVL flywheel
